[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001100 3
1 010011011 5
2 111111111 a
3 110110001 5
4 111001100 5
5 011111011 7
6 111111111 a
7 110110001 5

01 10 110111111 8
12 21 111111100 7
23 32 011011111 7
34 43 111011111 8
45 54 111111111 a match 2 6
56 65 110110101 6
67 76 111101101 7
70 07 011101111 7

02 20 011101111 7
13 31 110111011 7
24 42 111011111 8
35 53 110111011 7
46 64 111011111 8
57 75 111111001 7
60 06 110101111 7
71 17 111111001 7

03 30 010111111 7
14 41 111111111 a match 2 6
25 52 111111101 8
36 63 110011111 7
47 74 111111111 a match 2 6
50 05 110111111 8
61 16 110110100 5
72 27 001101101 5

04 40 111111111 a match 2 6
15 51 110110001 5 match 3 7
26 62 111001100 5 match 4
37 73 011111011 7 match 5
